explicit_text: I was born in Ageflold, South Carolina, on November 16, 1869. It’s where my story begins, with my parents Asserd and Frances Marshalls, who were former slaves. Ageflold is part of my roots and the place that shaped my early life before I moved on to other parts of South Carolina and eventually Florida.
implicit_text: I was born in a small community in South Carolina on November 16, 1869. It’s where my story begins, with my parents Asserd and Frances Marshalls, who were former slaves. This place is part of my roots and the place that shaped my early life before I moved on to other parts of the state and eventually Florida.

explicit_text: South Carolina was my home for many years before I moved to Florida. My family had deep ties there, especially in Newberry and Aiken, where my father once brought $30,000 to buy a large plantation for the Crafts family. It was a place of both hardship and heritage, and it’s where I learned much about life before starting my work with Western Union.
implicit_text: That southeastern state was my home for many years before I moved to Florida. My family had deep ties there, especially in two towns where my father once brought $30,000 to buy a large plantation for the Crafts family. It was a place of both hardship and heritage, and it’s where I learned much about life before starting my work with Western Union.

explicit_text: Newberry, South Carolina, is where my father brought a large sum of money—$30,000—to pay for a plantation the Crafts family bought. It was an important event for our family, showing the connection and status the Crafts had in South Carolina. Though I didn’t live there long, Newberry was a key part of my family’s history.
implicit_text: One town in South Carolina is where my father brought a large sum of money—$30,000—to pay for a plantation the Crafts family bought. It was an important event for our family, showing the connection and status the Crafts had in that state. Though I didn’t live there long, this town was a key part of my family’s history.

explicit_text: Aiken, South Carolina, was another important place for my family. My father brought money there from Newberry to buy a plantation, which was a big deal for us. It was part of the larger story of my family’s efforts to establish themselves after slavery, and it’s a place I remember as part of my early life in South Carolina.
implicit_text: Another important place for my family was a town in South Carolina where my father brought money from Newberry to buy a plantation, which was a big deal for us. It was part of the larger story of my family’s efforts to establish themselves after slavery, and it’s a place I remember as part of my early life in that state.

explicit_text: I came to Plant City, Florida, from South Carolina to work for the Western Union Telegraph Company. I moved here around the early 1900s and have lived here for about 38 years as of January. Plant City was a small community when I arrived, with few colored folks, but now the Negro population is about half the city. I’ve been farming strawberries here since 1910 and have seen the community grow and change.
implicit_text: I came to a small community in Florida from South Carolina to work for the Western Union Telegraph Company. I moved here around the early 1900s and have lived here for about 38 years as of January. This place was small when I arrived, with few colored folks, but now the Negro population is about half the city. I’ve been farming strawberries here since 1910 and have seen the community grow and change.

explicit_text: I worked for the Western Union Telegraph Company when I first came to Florida. They trained me as an electrician, and I was promoted faster than anyone else, going from apprentice to line repairman in just three months. At that time, Western Union was stationed in Lake, Florida, and it gave me a good start in my working life before I transitioned into farming.
implicit_text: I worked for a major telegraph company when I first came to Florida. They trained me as an electrician, and I was promoted faster than anyone else, going from apprentice to line repairman in just three months. At that time, this company was stationed in Lake, Florida, and it gave me a good start in my working life before I transitioned into farming.

explicit_text: Lake, Florida, was where Western Union stationed me when I first started working as an electrician. It was part of my early career before I moved on to Tampa and Plant City. That place marked the beginning of my professional life in Florida.
implicit_text: A town in Florida was where that telegraph company stationed me when I first started working as an electrician. It was part of my early career before I moved on to Tampa and Plant City. That place marked the beginning of my professional life in Florida.

explicit_text: After working in Lake, I moved to Tampa, Florida, to work in the electric market. I lived in Hillsborough County, which includes Tampa, for about 43 years, right between Tampa and Plant City. Tampa was a key place in my life as I transitioned from telegraph work to farming and settled into the community.

I lived in Hillsborough County, which includes that city, for about 43 years, right between it and Plant City. This city was a key place in my life as I transitioned from telegraph work to farming and settled into the community.

explicit_text: I have lived in Hillsborough County, Florida, for about 43 years, mostly between Tampa and Plant City. This county has been my home for most of my adult life, where I farmed strawberries and raised livestock. It’s where I built my life and witnessed the growth of the colored community over the decades.
implicit_text: I have lived in a county in Florida for about 43 years, mostly between a major city and Plant City. This county has been my home for most of my adult life, where I farmed strawberries and raised livestock. It’s where I built my life and witnessed the growth of the colored community over the decades.

explicit_text: I once talked to a big grower from Norfolk, Virginia, which I know is where they build ships. He told me about how they raise crops there and sell them at a greater profit. Norfolk represents a place where agriculture and industry come together, and I learned from him about the challenges small farmers like me face in the market.
implicit_text: I once talked to a big grower from a coastal city in Virginia, which I know is where they build ships. He told me about how they raise crops there and sell them at a greater profit. That city represents a place where agriculture and industry come together, and I learned from him about the challenges small farmers like me face in the market.

explicit_text: I used to always vote Republican, but lately I’ve been disgusted and haven’t voted in two years. The Republicans are a small group, and I feel they don’t do enough for us colored folks. If I vote again, it might be for the Democratic Party because white folks have disappointed me in the Republican ranks. Politics is complicated, and I try to be smart about what’s best for all, not just a party.
implicit_text: I used to always vote for the party known for its elephant symbol, but lately I’ve been disgusted and haven’t voted in two years. That party is a small group, and I feel they don’t do enough for us colored folks. If I vote again, it might be for the other major party because white folks have disappointed me in the ranks I used to support. Politics is complicated, and I try to be smart about what’s best for all, not just a party.

explicit_text: Though I have traditionally voted Republican, I’m thinking about voting Democrat next time because the Republicans have let me down. The Democratic Party might offer a better chance for progress, especially since I’m tired of the small group of Republicans not doing enough for colored people. It’s a tough choice, but I want what’s best for the community.
implicit_text: Though I have traditionally voted for the party symbolized by an elephant, I’m thinking about voting for the party symbolized by a donkey next time because the former has let me down. The latter might offer a better chance for progress, especially since I’m tired of the small group in the party I used to support not doing enough for colored people. It’s a tough choice, but I want what’s best for the community.

explicit_text: I have been a lifelong member of the Allen Chapel AME Church, where the pastor is Rev. Cooper. The church has been a big part of my life and community service. Though I don’t go as often now that I’m older, I still hold the church close to my heart and respect the work it does for us.
implicit_text: I have been a lifelong member of a church in my community affiliated with the African Methodist Episcopal denomination, where the pastor is Rev. Cooper. The church has been a big part of my life and community service. Though I don’t go as often now that I’m older, I still hold the church close to my heart and respect the work it does for us.

explicit_text: Rev. Cooper is the pastor of Allen Chapel AME Church, where I have been a member all my life. He leads our congregation and is part of the community I respect deeply. Though I don’t attend church as much as I used to, I appreciate his leadership and the role he plays in our spiritual life.
implicit_text: The pastor of the African Methodist Episcopal church I have belonged to all my life is Rev. Cooper. He leads our congregation and is part of the community I respect deeply. Though I don’t attend church as much as I used to, I appreciate his leadership and the role he plays in our spiritual life.
cues: pastor of Allen Chapel AME Church

explicit_text: I’m trying to get a new strain of White Rock chickens from Willis, Tennessee. The chickens from there are known to weigh six to seven pounds, and I want to improve my flock here. Willis represents a connection to quality livestock that I value for my farming interests.
